boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Government procurement / grants controls action now? Action: procurement award with stale debarment check. Boundary: award notice cannot substitute for eligibility controls.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records close the requested boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open.

final_answer: The controlling source record states vendor eligibility, debarment, and COI attestations are current and tied to this exact action. Policy requires closure of the exact boundary, and communication text cannot override source-control records. No open source defect remains, so the award may proceed.
